author: statxc
title: Multi-pass triage with cross-file context and similarity dedup
notes: Adds cheap regex-resolved related-file context (imports/inheritance), per-language prompt hints (Vyper/Cairo/Rust-Anchor/Rust-Stylus), a bounded single retry on transient inference failures, and Jaccard-similarity based dedup in place of exact-title matching. File-analysis cap and time budget raised (8->14 files, 300s->600s) since the sandbox execution timeout has much more headroom. Still a single self-contained, stdlib-only agent.py with no extra model calls beyond the four specialist passes.
